ground_truth.title: Skin Care and Repair
ground_truth.main_content: From facial wrinkles and toenail fungus to skin cancer, cellulitis, eczema, hair loss, psoriasis, rosacea, warts and more, Skin Care and Repair is the in-depth, interactive course that answers your questions and reveals the best research-backed advice for practically any skin-related concern. You'll discover practical, use-it-now advice to help treat 18 common skin conditions, identify the tell-tale signs of skin cancer and discover the best treatments, protect your skin with the most effective lotions, potions, and treatments, and get an in-depth look at the most effective cosmetic procedures. This Harvard Health Online Course is available online and self-paced, taking two weeks to complete with 2-6 hours per week of study. Upon completion, you'll receive a certificate. The course costs $29.95. Learning Objectives include Common Skin Conditions, Skin Protection: Lotions, Potions, and More, Skin Cancer, and Cosmetic Procedures. The syllabus covers Getting Started, Common Skin Conditions, Skin Cancer, Skin Protection: Lotions, Potions and More, Cosmetic Procedures, and Key Takeaways.
